description:
Update all deps-cell adapters to output rules.star instead of BUCK.

Files to update:
- nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/go.nix (gobuckify.json config + cell buckconfig)
- nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/rust.nix (heredocs + cell buckconfig)
- nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/python.nix (heredocs + cell buckconfig)
- nix/lib/deps-cell/adapters/javascript.nix (heredocs + cell buckconfig)

Changes per file:
1. Change 'cat > $out/BUCK' to 'cat > $out/rules.star'
2. Change heredoc delimiter from BUCK to RULES (cosmetic)
3. Update [buildfile] name in cell .buckconfig sections
4. For go.nix: add buildfile_name to gobuckify.json config
title: Update Nix deps-cell adapters to generate rules.star
